parameters.command: CID=$(security find-generic-password -s calvinball-mcp -a client-id -w) && CSEC=$(security find-generic-password -s calvinball-mcp -a client-secret -w) && curl -sf -X POST https://calvinball.mikebronner.dev/oauth/token -d grant_type=client_credentials -d client_id=$CID -d client_secret=$CSEC | jq -r .access_token
LOCK=/tmp/moe.lock; if [ -f "$LOCK" ] && kill -0 "$(cat "$LOCK")" 2>/dev/null; then echo busy; else echo free; fi

=LOCK=/tmp/moe.lock && echo $$ > "$LOCK" && trap 'rm -f $LOCK' EXIT && LOG=$HOME/.n8n/logs/moe-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ).log && mkdir -p $HOME/.n8n/logs && WORKBENCH_SKIP_WARMUP=1 WORKBENCH_SKIP_LOG=1 claude -p --agent dev-pipeline:moe --model opus --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence --max-budget-usd 5.00 "Process this Calvinball work item: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}" 2>&1 | tee "$LOG"
